Episodes.Title: Episode #1.1
Episodes.Writer: Scott Frank, Chandni Lakhani, Jussi Adler-Olsen
Episodes.Actors: Matthew Goode, Angus Yellowlees, Jamie Sives
Episodes.Plot: DCI Carl Mørck returns to work after a near-fatal incident and finds himself head of a new department. A prosecutor faces a tough day in court.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.2
Episodes.Writer: Scott Frank, Chandni Lakhani, Jussi Adler-Olsen
Episodes.Actors: Chloe Pirrie, Alexej Manvelov, Matthew Goode
Episodes.Plot: As Carl and his new assistant start digging into their first cold case, he can't stop his personal demons encroaching on his professional life.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.3
Episodes.Writer: Scott Frank, Chandni Lakhani, Jussi Adler-Olsen
Episodes.Actors: Chloe Pirrie, Alison Peebles, Steven Miller
Episodes.Plot: Carl and Akram recreate the fateful ferry journey on their way to the isle of Mhor, a frustrated Rose makes her case for joining the department.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.4
Episodes.Writer: Scott Frank, Chandni Lakhani, Jussi Adler-Olsen
Episodes.Actors: Chloe Pirrie, Alison Peebles, Steven Miller
Episodes.Plot: Rose goes to the island to find out what Carl couldn't. Akram finds a note which sends the investigation in an entirely new direction.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.5
Episodes.Writer: Scott Frank, Chandni Lakhani, Jussi Adler-Olsen
Episodes.Actors: Matthew Goode, Alexej Manvelov, Alec Newman
Episodes.Plot: The prosecutor's disappearance becomes connected with a death. A scuffle in a newspaper office sees Carl making headlines, and Moira sees a therapist.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.6
Episodes.Writer: Scott Frank, Chandni Lakhani, Jussi Adler-Olsen
Episodes.Actors: Chloe Pirrie, Steven Miller, Alexej Manvelov
Episodes.Plot: The police detain a suspect for the Leith Park shooting. Carl returns to the scene of the crime, before losing his temper in public once again.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.7
Episodes.Writer: Jussi Adler-Olsen, Scott Frank, Chandni Lakhani
Episodes.Actors: Jamie Sives, Leah Byrne, Kai Alexander
Episodes.Plot: Carl makes some dangerous allegations to some powerful men, while Rose takes a fresh angle to uncover more information about Sam Haig.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.8
Episodes.Writer: Scott Frank, Chandni Lakhani, Jussi Adler-Olsen
Episodes.Actors: Matthew Goode, Nolan Willis, Lily Knight
Episodes.Plot: The kidnappers give their victim a clue as they press her for an answer to their question. Dept. Q gets closer to unraveling its own riddle.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.9
Episodes.Writer: Scott Frank, Chandni Lakhani, Jussi Adler-Olsen
Episodes.Actors: Kai Alexander, Stuart Bowman, Matthew Goode
Episodes.Plot: A decades-old recording helps all the clues to fall into place. But as the pressure rises - in and out of the chamber - can Carl get there in time?
